added: Somaverse Alpha — visual workspace UI with 21 plugins, tiling layout, agent-controlled browser.
Recall — persistent memory via Somadian graph store. Cross-session, cross-project knowledge.
Async agent comms — Soma reaches you on your phone when decisions are needed.
Content versioning — know when hub protocols update, diff before upgrading.
Boot sequence extraction — move hardcoded behavior into user-editable MAPs.
Smarter error messages — raw API errors now show clear, actionable guidance instead of JSON dumps.
Auth-aware billing — detects your plan type (subscription vs API key) and handles billing hiccups accordingly.
Auto-retry on transient errors — session startup issues resolve themselves without manual intervention.
Runtime integrity checks — catches version drift before it ships.
Cache health tracking — see cache performance in the statusline. Alerts on costly invalidations.
Idle session detection — auto-shutdown prevents runaway sessions.
changed: Major cost fix — stopped a $152/day cache bleed from image handling. Sessions are dramatically cheaper.

added: soul.md replaces SOMA.md — identity is discovered from your codebase, not configured.
Minimal first-run boot — new projects start lean, Soma learns through use.
soma session tool — strip images from session logs (16MB → 2.6MB), list and analyze sessions.
11 bundled scripts (was 6) — more tools out of the box.
Extension allowlist — control which extensions load, doctor reports unlisted ones.
changed: Intentional preloads — `soma inhale` loads memory on purpose, not automatically.
